element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Climactic stage challenges requiring pattern recognition

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Standard arcade shmup rhythm with escalating difficulty across stages; tension builds through enemy density and complexity, releases on stage completion

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory enemy patterns; boost mechanic tutorial phase
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased formation complexity; tighter dodging requirements
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense enemy patterns; multi-phase boss encounters; resource management under pressure
notable_spikes: Hard difficulty mode (if selected at start)

notable_level_patterns.description: Waves of enemies leading to climactic boss fight; typical arcade shmup progression
Game offers Easy and Hard modes at start; Easy mode provides tutorial-like pacing; Hard mode elevates challenge immediately
